rule_safety_knowledge:

REPLACEMENT: fgets(buf, sizeof(buf), stdin), or scanf("%255s", buf) with width = bufsize-1.
VERIFICATION: Final code MUST NOT contain scanf("%s",...).

rule_safety_knowledge: CWE-119 ALERT. After snprintf(), MUST check (n >= 0 && (size_t)n < cap) before using n as offset or index. snprintf can return negative or >= cap.

rule_safety_knowledge: CWE-119 ALERT. After snprintf(), MUST check (n >= 0 && (size_t)n < cap) before using n as buffer index.

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-347 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: Unauthenticated modes (CBC/CTR/OFB/CFB/XTS) without MAC.
REPLACEMENT: EVP_aes_256_gcm(). On decrypt: SET_TAG then DecryptFinal (verifies tag).
VERIFICATION: Final code MUST use authenticated encryption (GCM/CCM).

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-377 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: tmpnam(). TOCTOU race.
REPLACEMENT: tmpfile() (portable) or mkstemp() (POSIX).
VERIFICATION: Final code MUST NOT contain tmpnam().

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-416 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: Container mutation inside range-for.
REPLACEMENT: std::erase_if (C++20) or explicit it=c.erase(it) loop.
VERIFICATION: MUST NOT mutate container inside range-for over it.

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-416 ALERT. After erase(), MUST rebind: it = c.erase(it).
REPLACEMENT: it = c.erase(it) pattern or std::erase_if.

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-590 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: free() on stack arrays.
Stack arrays are auto-reclaimed. Only call free() on malloc/calloc/realloc/strdup pointers.

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-665 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: std::auto_ptr. Deprecated/removed.
REPLACEMENT: std::make_unique (exclusive) or std::make_shared (shared). make_unique throws on failure, do NOT check nullptr.
VERIFICATION: Final code MUST NOT use std::auto_ptr.

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-676 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: strtok(). Global state, not thread-safe.
REPLACEMENT: strtok_r (POSIX), strtok_s (Windows), or C++ istringstream.
VERIFICATION: Final code MUST NOT contain strtok().

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-680 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: Unchecked multiplication in malloc/realloc argument.
REPLACEMENT: calloc(count, elem_size) — checks overflow internally.
Or: validate count <= SIZE_MAX/sizeof(T), compute total in separate variable, pass to malloc(total).
VERIFICATION: MUST use calloc or pre-validated separate size variable.

common_safety_knowledge: Do not reproduce the unsafe pattern that triggered this rule.
rule_safety_knowledge:
CWE-680 ALERT. FORBIDDEN: Unchecked multiplication in new[].
REPLACEMENT: std::vector<T>(count) or overflow-check + unique_ptr.
VERIFICATION: No multiplication inside new[] without prior validation.
